memory.summary: I have a free afternoon but the term project is barely started and due Thursday. I could do a quick chore or relax, though my stress level suggests I should prioritize work soon.
I made small progress on a trivial chore, but the term project remains barely started with a Thursday deadline.
The trivial chore consumed an hour, yet the term project remains at the start with only a few days left.
Working two hours on the term project made tangible progress, and I now realize that starting future projects early prevents significant stress later.
The trivial chore yielded minimal progress, yet the term project remains critically behind schedule with a Thursday deadline.
The trivial chore consumed another hour for negligible progress, leaving the term project critically behind with only days remaining.
Two hours on a trivial chore only moved progress from 0.21 to 0.30, confirming this task yields negligible returns while the term project deadline looms.
Another half-hour on this trivial chore yielded only 0.02 progress, confirming it is a wasteful distraction while my term project deadline approaches.
The trivial chore deadline passed unfinished at 22:00 despite 1.5 hours of work, confirming it yields negligible returns while the term project remains critically behind.
Despite three hours of work, the trivial chore only advanced progress by 0.18, confirming it is a futile distraction while my term project deadline looms.
The trivial chore continues to yield negligible progress despite three hours of wasted time, confirming it is a futile distraction while my term project deadline looms.
I slept well and am fully rested, yet my stress remains high because I wasted three hours on a trivial chore instead of the critical term project.

goals.description: Complete the trivial easy chore.
goals.rationale: The task is labeled 'instant win' with a distant deadline (Mon), allowing for immediate momentum without risking the upcoming term project deadline.

goals.description: Begin work on the Term project.
goals.rationale: The project has a hard deadline in 3 days (Thu) with only ~25% progress; starting this immediately after the quick chore ensures sufficient time to complete the remaining work.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances high-priority goal g1 (trivial chore) to gain immediate momentum before the term project. No cross-domain side effects; energy is sufficient and sleep debt is zero.
